# TriTrader

> TriTrader runs WSOP-style trading competitions. Traders across every major asset class — forex, indices, commodities, crypto and stocks — compete head-to-head in one-week tournaments on simulated trades priced against real-time market data. Pay one fixed entry fee (your only risk), compete for a week, and the top 15% of the field share a prize pool funded entirely by entry fees.

## What it is
- Format: one-week, skill-based trading competition in a simulated environment (no real positions, no real capital at risk beyond the entry fee).
- Markets: forex, indices, commodities, crypto, stocks — all in a single competition, priced on real-time data.
- Payouts: top 15% of the field cash. Minimum paid place returns 1.1× the entry fee; the top prize is 20× the entry fee. The other 85% do not get paid.
- Prize pool: funded entirely by entry fees (poker-rake model). ~45% of every entry goes back to players (40% leaderboard pool + 5% bounty pool).
- Bounties: a separate pool rewards the week's sharpest trades (best risk-adjusted return, smallest drawdown, biggest comeback, and more) — winnable alongside a leaderboard prize.
- Stakes tiers: Contender, Elite, Champion — higher buy-in, bigger prizes. Same payout structure at every tier.

## How it differs from prop firm challenges (FTMO, etc.)
- One week, not months. No evaluation rules to follow. Rewards pure performance, not rule-compliance. Real prize money, not a funded account.

## Current status
- Pre-launch. Building a waitlist ahead of the first competition. Joining the waitlist is free, requires only an email, and carries no obligation to pay.
